query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'bruno.vieira@to.sebrae.com.br') as brunoId,
  (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'dina.makiyama@sebrae.to.gov.br') as dinaId,
  (SELECT id FROM departamentos WHERE nome LIKE '%Ckm Talents%') as deptId;
